article.body_preview: Bangladesh's ready-made garments (RMG) sector has contributed hugely to the country's transformation since the Multi-Fibre Arrangement (MFA), which set quotas on garment exports from newly industrialised Asian countries into the US, enabled a race to capture apparel share trades. China's loss of share in garments is likely to accelerate, and India is being encouraged to target at least $100bn of the $500bn global RMG trade. llm_connections.evidence_quote: Safety and compliance standards have improved substantially since the Rana Plaza accident
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article links the Rana Plaza accident to industry-wide improvements in safety and compliance, which directly relates to operational disruptions and safety risks encompassed by 'Factory_Issue'.
